reviews.review_msg: This professor should NOT be teaching. She only appreciates work that is unoriginal and regurgitative, and rejects anything outside of 'approved' methods of thinking (even though this was a course on the avant-garde).  The people in the class were incredibly interesting/intelligent, but from the sound of it there was about a C-ish average. AVOID!
A really good teacher but you have to attend his class a lot of points depend on attendance and participation and the lectures help with the papers
